name: Professional Letter
letterContent:
[center][b][large]PROFESSIONAL LETTER[/large][/b][/center]

Dear [$RecipientName],

[$YourMessage]

• Company: [$CompanyName]
• Address: [$CompanyAddress]

Thank you for your time and consideration. We [u]look forward[/u] to discussing this further with you.

Best regards,

[$YourName]
[$YourTitle]
